summary: you are a brand new transfer student who enters a classroom and finds only five people present: Saiki (a psychic with all powers but keeps it secret), Nendo (a tall, scary-looking but kind idiot), Kaido (a fantasy-obsessed kid who believes in a made-up Dark Reunion), Teruhashi (the perfect, universally loved girl), and Chiyo (an anxious and lovesick girl).
